ol.li: Thread Safety: State transitions must be atomic (mutex-protected).
CUDA Context: Ensure cudaFree(0) is called during INIT to verify driver.
Metrics: All state durations reported to Prometheus as model_state_seconds_total.
Timeout: Total transition from INIT to READY must not exceed 300s.

div.p: Invariant: • model_path is valid • GPU device detected • Memory allocated
Invariant: • Weights in VRAM • CUDA context active • GPU mem reserved
Invariant: • Model operational • Warmup complete • Accepting requests
Invariant: • Error logged • state == FAILED • Partial allocation
